headline: Williams Sonoma (WSM) Valuation Check As Earnings Approach And Multi Channel Efforts Gain Attention
summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) heads into its March 18 earnings report with investors weighing expectations for a 1.9% revenue decline against recent estimate revisions, executive changes, and brand investments that keep attention firmly on the stock. See our latest analysis for Williams-Sonoma. At a share price of US$182.36, Williams-Sonoma has recently seen a 15.0% 30 day share price return decline. Its 1 year total shareholder return of 5.8% and 3 year total shareholder return above 200% keep...

headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Micron Earnings: Happening This Week
summary: The Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision dominates this week's calendar. Investors will also closely monitor February’s producer-price index for inflation signals, alongside a corporate earnings slate featuring Micron, Lululemon and FedEx.

headline: Williams-Sonoma Earnings: What To Look For From WSM
summary: Kitchenware and home goods retailer Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday morning. Here’s what you need to know.
